steps.name: Given the user is signed in
Clicking signin button in the header
And the user is on the "My Space" page
When the user opens the Edit Profile page
Click on Edit profile button on Profile Banner component
And the user updates location privacy to "Показувати тільки мені"

steps.name: And the user updates eco places privacy to "Показувати тільки мені"
And the user updates to-do privacy to "Показувати тільки мені"
Then the Save button should be enabled
When the user clicks the Save button
Then the user should be redirected to the profile page
When the user reopens the Edit Profile page
Then the location privacy should be "Показувати тільки мені"
And the eco places privacy should be "Показувати тільки мені"
And the to-do privacy should be "Показувати тільки мені"
